verses.commentary: In God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ locates the church within divine reality. The source of identity is not geography or ethnicity but union with Father and Son.
Grace and peace from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ parallels divine names, suggesting Jesus' full deity. Peace is not absence of conflict but wholeness rooted in divine favor.

We ought always to thank God establishes obligation. And rightly so adds emphasis: thanksgiving is fitting response. Because your faith is growing more and more and the love all of you have for one another is increasing identifies growth in the two greatest commandments.

Therefore, among God's churches we boast reveals pride in their endurance. Perseverance and faith in all the persecutions and trials you are enduring links steadfastness to ongoing suffering. Faith proves genuine through fire.

All this is evidence that God's judgment is right interprets suffering as proof of divine justice. You will be counted worthy of the kingdom of God, for which you are suffering shows that suffering qualifies for kingdom entrance, not as merit but as evidence of genuine faith.
God is just declares foundational attribute. He will pay back trouble to those who trouble you promises divine retribution. Justice demands oppressors receive what they inflicted.

Give relief to you who are troubled, and to us as well includes Paul in suffering. When the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven sets timing at the parousia. In blazing fire with his powerful angels depicts judgment in theophanic imagery recalling Sinai.
He will punish those who do not know God and do not obey the gospel defines the lost: ignorance and disobedience. Two groups or one group described two ways. Judgment falls on gospel rejection.

Punished with everlasting destruction describes eternal conscious punishment. Shut out from the presence of the Lord and from the glory of his might defines hell as exclusion from God's presence. The greatest loss is loss of God.

On the day he comes to be glorified in his holy people reveals Christ's glorification through his redeemed. To be marveled at among all those who have believed shows Christ as object of wonder. This includes you because you believed personalizes the promise.

With this in mind marks application. We constantly pray for you shows unceasing intercession. That our God may make you worthy of his calling prays for perseverance. By his power he may bring to fruition your every desire for goodness and your every deed prompted by faith asks for completed transformation.

We pray this so that the name of our Lord Jesus may be glorified in you states purpose: Christ's glory displayed through believers' lives. And you in him shows mutual glorification. According to the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ grounds transformation in unmerited favor.
